testcase.name: test_torchvision_transforms

failure.message: TypeError: pic should be PIL Image or ndarray. Got <class 'torch.Tensor'>

testcase.failure: tests/test_pytorch_functionality_converted.py:68: in test_torchvision_transforms output = transform(dummy_input) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/torchvision/transforms/transforms.py:95: in __call__ img = t(img) ^^^^^^ venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/torchvision/transforms/transforms.py:137: in __call__ return F.to_tensor(pic) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/torchvision/transforms/functional.py:142: in to_tensor raise TypeError(f"pic should be PIL Image or ndarray. Got {type(pic)}") E TypeError: pic should be PIL Image or ndarray. Got <class 'torch.Tensor'>
